SEGA says Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds and Shinobi: Art of Vengeance sales haven’t met its expectations

SEGA has provided an update on the sales of Sonic Racing: CrossWorlds and Shinobi: Art of Vengeance, with both being labeled as a disappointment. That brief update comes from the company’s latest financial report. In it, we can see that sales for the two titles were said to “have fallen short of expectation” despite a strong critical reception. What’s interesting...

Riviera: The Promised Land reveals Nintendo Switch physical release, pre-orders open

Play-Asia today revealed a brand new physical version of Riviera: The Promised Land for Nintendo Switch. Copies will ship on July 30, 2026. Riviera: The Promised Land was previously sold on the Nintendo eShop. The game, an updated version of Sting’s PSP RPG, first came out digitally at the end of 2024. Kingdom Hearts Collection [1-3] Nintendo Switch 2 boxart replaced following AI usage accusations

Square Enix has gone ahead and updated the boxart for Kingdom Hearts Collection [1-3], following claims that the original image was made with the help of AI.
